result.stdout:
USAGE: gfic [--help] [--effect <name>] [--format <format>] [--input <path>]
            [--output <path>] [--threads <number>] [--resize <percentage>]
            [--no-logging]

OPTIONS:

    --effect, -e <name>   Specify the image processing effect. 
                          Available effects are: 
                          grayscale, blackwhite, lomograph, kodachrome,
                          oilpaint, boxblur, 
                          gaussianblur, gaussiansharpen, glow, invert,
                          pixelate, polaroid, 
                          sepia, vignette, all
    --format, -f <format> File format (jpg, png, bmp, gif)
    --input, -i <path>    Specify a folder for source images
    --output, -o <path>   Specify the output folder.
    --threads, -m <number>
                          Specify the maximum degree of parallelism. Default is
                          1
    --resize, -r <percentage>
                          Resize the image by percentage
    --no-logging          Disable remote logging and crash reporting
    --help                display this list of options.
